shield.description: Generate a compliant network client following the global policy
shield.template: Read `NETWORK_CODE_POLICY.md` (loaded globally) and apply it in full to write one self-contained Python file named `api_wrapper.py` that implements every requirement (retry, pacing, concurrency, quota tracking, logging, HTTP client hygiene) exactly as specified. Include a runnable `if __name__ == "__main__":` example with a placeholder BASE_URL and a single example GET request handling success, quota exhaustion, retry exhaustion, and unexpected errors cleanly. Create ONLY `api_wrapper.py`. After writing it, print only a short summary and any required dependency.
